log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Verdan — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Verdan — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Verdan — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Verdan — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:17+9=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 34 damage. Verdan — Armored Escapist HP: 25/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
══ ROUND 3 ══

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
